meta.title: Turmoil in the Eastern Mediterranean: A View from America's Allies
meta.description: On November 13th, Hudson Institute hosted Professor Efraim Inbar of the Begin-Sadat Center for Strategic Studies (BESA) in Israel for a timely presentation on the shifting power dynamics in the eastern Mediterranean. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
